incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on first attempt

steps.text: Let's look closely: you counted 5 Cats. How many symbols did you place?

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on second attempt

steps.text: Here's a hint: each symbol stands for 1 Cat. You counted 5 Cats, so you need 5 symbols in the Cats row.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System places 5 cat symbols in Cats row, one at a time

steps.text: Let me show you how this works. You counted 5 Cats. Each symbol represents 1 Cat, so I place 5 symbols in the Cats row. That's how we show 5 Cats on the graph.
